result.stdout:
SudokuSolver 1.0.1+a53788321f12ac98a4a9507555fc9b4da06e950f
Copyright (C) 2026 Kristian Skov Johansen

  board       Required. The soduko board in a one dimentional array, row after
              row.

  solver      Required. What solver to use. Valid values: SequentialBacktrack,
              CardinalityBacktrack, RandomBacktrack, Logical,
              LogicalWithSequentialBacktrack, LogicalWithCardinalityBacktrack,
              LogicalWithRandomBacktrack

  timeout     (Default: -1) How many seconds should the search be allowed to
              use.

  solution    The file to output the solution to. Empty means no file will be
              made.

  help        Display more information on a specific command.

  version     Display version information.
